releases.label: Public Source Catalog 1
releases.summary: First public catalog of HETDEX, the untargeted VIRUS IFU spectroscopic survey (3500-5500 A) on the 10 m Hobby-Eberly Telescope, covering observations from January 2017 through June 2020 over 25 deg2 of contiguous fiber coverage (within a 540 deg2 footprint). The catalog table contains 232,650 source observations, including 51,863 Lya-emitter identifications, 123,891 [OII] emitters at z < 0.5, 37,916 stars, 5,274 low-redshift galaxies without emission lines, and 4,976 AGN, with classifications, redshifts, line fluxes and 1D spectra. Hosted at TACC, mirrored on Zenodo (10.5281/zenodo.7448504). Superseded by PDR1 / Public Source Catalog 2.

releases.label: PDR1 / Public Source Catalog 2
releases.summary: First full HETDEX public data release: 431,713 IFU observations (datacubes at 3470-5540 A, R~800) covering 86.67 deg2 of noncontiguous sky in the Spring (13h, +51 deg) and Fall (1.5h, 0 deg) fields plus legacy regions (COSMOS, GOODS-N, NEP, SA22), with the second source catalog (HPSC2) carrying machine-learning quality scores (p_conf, p_cnn). HPSC2 classifications total 1,106,433 entries: 426,654 LAEs, 491,411 [OII] emitters, 19,457 low-z galaxies, 18,303 AGN, and 150,608 stars. Hosted at TACC with an MPE SciServer mirror; Zenodo record 10.5281/zenodo.19581262 (2026-04).
